overview.what: A live-updating monitoring dashboard that visualizes system metrics in real-time. It features a server-push architecture that updates charts every second without page refreshes.
overview.how_it_works: The server uses Socket.io to establish a persistent bi-directional connection with the client. A backend interval generates mock metrics and broadcasts them to all connected clients, where Chart.js dynamically updates the line graph.
what_you_learn: Handling high-frequency data updates in React

files.description: React component listening for socket events.
